title: ITALY enforcement action against Comune di Mazara del Vallo (4,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 4,000 on the Comune di Mazara del Vallo. The controller used video surveillance technology to enforce traffic rules without a sufficient legal basis. Secondly, the controller used a camera system that had not been homologated or approved for this specif...
